name: Video Studio
summary: Turn raw clips + a song into a beat-synced hype video. Auto-build now; a full timeline editor is landing.
description: A built-in video editor. Drop in phone clips, bring the music (upload a track or paste a YouTube link), and it beat-detects the song, finds the money moments in each clip, cuts every cut onto a beat, slow-mos the finisher, and fires impact flashes on the big hits -- then renders an MP4 that lands in Files. Works on real family footage (analytical editing, no generative model, so no child-safety block). Runs entirely on the bundled ffmpeg -- no API key required; BYO keys unlock optional generative/voiceover extras. Opens as a dedicated /studio page (mobile + desktop).

help.h:
Drop in clips, add music (an uploaded track or a YouTube link), pick a pace, and Auto-build a beat-synced cut. The render lands in the Files lens and plays right in the page.

The full multi-track timeline editor (mark points, trim, insert, effects, CapCut export) is coming next.
